zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton於1505年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾莫頓時，她的父親John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith46歲，母親Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton44歲。她於大約1523年與Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1545年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾卡藍德享年41歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾其頌。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton于1505年出生在苏格兰度福利爾莫頓时，她的父亲John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith46岁，母亲Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton44岁。她于大约1523年与Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1545年在苏格兰斯林史爾卡藍德享年41岁，埋葬在苏格兰貝維其可爾其頌。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton was born in 1505, in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, her father, John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith, was 46 and her mother, Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton, was 44. She married Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC about 1523. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1545, in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 41, and was buried in Whitsome, Berwickshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton est née en 1505, à Morton, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC environ 1523. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1545, à Callander, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitsome, Berwickshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton 1505 in Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith 46 und ihre Mutter Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton 44. Sie hat um 1523 Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1545 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Whitsome, Berwickshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton è nata il nel 1505 nel Morton, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith, aveva 46 anni e sua madre, Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC circa 1523. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì circa 1545, nel Callander, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitsome, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Douglas of Mortonが1505年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアモートンで生まれた時，父John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeithは46歳，母Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Mortonは44歳であった。約1523年にSir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PCと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1545年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアカランダーで41歳で死去し，スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアウィトソメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton(이)가 1505년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 모르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith(은)는 46세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 대략 1523년 Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1545년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 캘랜더에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 버윅실르 휘츠에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Agnes Douglas of Morton родилась в 1505 г. в местности мортон, думфриессхир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Douglas 2nd Earl of Morton, 4th Lord of Dalkeith было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Janet Crichton of of Cranstoun-Riddle, latterly Countess of Morton, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Alexander Livingston 5th Lord Livingston of Callandar PC около 1523 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1545 г. в местности калландир, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности уицом, бирвиккшир, Шотландия.
